---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Reconner
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include CLI flags, output format, or behavior changes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references that might help.
